\tzpentry{ID4491}{Metamaterial Stoichiometry MolarRatio NbN QD Fe Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4491 introduces Metamaterial Stoichiometry MolarRatio NbN QD Fe Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \label{eq:metamaterial-stoichiometry} \mathrm{MolarRatio}: \; \mathrm{NbN}: \mathrm{QD}: \mathrm{Fe_3O_4}: \mathrm{Au}: \mathrm{DNA} = 0.15 : 0.25 : 0.10 : 0.20 : 0.30. \end{equation}
